patient.query: Yeah, it’s just… I can’t shake this feeling that if I don’t meet these expectations, I’ll disappoint everyone, including myself. It’s like there’s this constant voice in my head saying I have to be perfect, and it makes it really hard to focus on what I’m supposed to be doing. Sometimes, I just want to escape it all.
